rolling_30d.summary: Second Specs' local pages property is experiencing strong early-stage growth, with sessions up 38.1% MoM to 58 total, driven primarily by a massive 2500% surge in Paid Search traffic (26 sessions, 44.8% of mix). High-value conversions are accelerating dramatically: mainsite_clicks jumped 314.3% to 29 events, shop_now grew 283.3% to 23 events, and shop_glasses exploded 600% to 14 events—signaling effective funnel progression toward core business outcomes. Engagement rate declined 16.7 percentage points to 50% despite session growth, indicating the influx of paid traffic is somewhat less engaged than organic/direct visitors, though absolute engaged sessions remain steady at 29. The Edmonton location page (/alberta/edmonton) is the clear traffic engine with 16 sessions and explosive 1500% MoM growth, while Saskatchewan/Saskatoon (71.4% engagement) and St. Albert (100% engagement) show strong quality signals. YTD 2026 sits at 104 sessions across three months, with March delivering 57 sessions—the highest monthly volume to date.

quick_wins.title: Paid Search is delivering massive ROI
quick_wins.detail: Paid Search traffic surged 2500% MoM to 26 sessions (44.8% of total) and is driving high-intent users to mainsite_clicks (up 314.3%) and shop_now events (up 283.3%). Continue optimizing ad copy and bid strategy for these proven keywords.

quick_wins.title: Edmonton location page is a conversion magnet
quick_wins.detail: /alberta/edmonton generated 16 sessions with 43.8% engagement and saw 1500% MoM growth—it's the top landing page by volume. Replicate this page structure and messaging for other underperforming location pages.

quick_wins.title: Shop_glasses event shows explosive demand signal
quick_wins.detail: shop_glasses spiked 600% MoM to 14 events, indicating strong product-specific intent. Ensure this event is properly attributed and consider expanding product-level funnel tracking.

potential_warnings.title: Engagement rate declining despite session growth
potential_warnings.detail: Engagement rate fell 16.7 percentage points to 50% even as sessions grew 38.1%, suggesting paid search traffic is less engaged than organic/direct. Monitor quality of paid keywords and audience targeting to avoid driving unqualified clicks.

potential_warnings.title: Organic Search traffic dropped sharply
potential_warnings.detail: Organic Search declined 47.4% MoM to just 10 sessions (17.2% of mix), likely due to heavy reliance on new paid campaigns. Once paid budgets stabilize, organic growth should be a secondary priority to reduce CAC dependency.

potential_warnings.title: Location finder events are stagnant
potential_warnings.detail: store_locate (3 events, flat MoM) and get_directions/locate_me (2 events each) are minimal, suggesting users are not leveraging local intent tools. This may indicate weak location targeting or low discovery of these features.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale Paid Search investment
biggest_opportunities.detail: Paid Search delivered 2500% growth and now drives 44.8% of sessions with strong conversion signals (mainsite_clicks +314.3%, shop_now +283.3%). Increase budget and test new location-based ad sets to replicate Edmonton's success across other markets.

biggest_opportunities.title: Optimize landing page portfolio for location intent
biggest_opportunities.detail: Top performers (/alberta/edmonton at 1500% growth, /alberta/st-albert at 100% engagement, /saskatchewan/saskatoon at 71.4% engagement) show location pages drive quality traffic. Audit and refresh underperforming location pages (e.g., /alberta/calgary at only 57.1% engagement) using the Edmonton template.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand product-level event tracking and merchandising
biggest_opportunities.detail: shop_glasses surged 600% and shop_now grew 283.3%, but you're only capturing 23 shop_now events total across 58 sessions. Implement product recommendations on location pages and track product-category events to unlock deeper funnel visibility and upsell opportunities.

biggest_opportunities.title: Activate location finder and call conversion tracking
biggest_opportunities.detail: store_locate, get_directions, and calls are critically underrepresented (3, 2, and 0 events respectively) despite strong local intent signals. Ensure CTAs are visible, mobile-optimized, and properly instrumented—these are high-value actions that may be silently converting offline.

last_calendar_month.summary: Second Specs' GA4 property delivered strong MoM growth in March 2026, with sessions climbing 39.0% to 57 and high-value conversions surging across multiple channels. Paid Search emerged as the dominant driver, rocketing 2300% MoM to capture 42.1% of traffic (24 sessions), while mainsite_clicks exploded 366.7% and shop_glasses spiked 500%, indicating robust lower-funnel intent. However, engagement rate contracted 15.0 percentage points despite session growth, suggesting an influx of less-engaged traffic, likely from the Paid Search surge. Local landing pages—particularly /alberta/edmonton (+1500% MoM, 43.8% engagement) and /saskatchewan/saskatoon (71.4% engagement)—are performing as strong conversion funnels. Organic Search declined 38.9% MoM, offsetting some of the paid momentum. YTD 2026 stands at 104 sessions across Q1, with month-over-month acceleration indicating a maturing property, though engagement quality requires attention to ensure traffic velocity translates to sustainable business outcomes.

quick_wins.title: Paid Search is driving explosive growth
quick_wins.detail: Paid Search surged 2300% MoM to 24 sessions (42.1% of traffic), with mainsite_clicks rising 366.7% and shop_glasses up 500%, signaling strong campaign-to-conversion alignment.

quick_wins.title: /alberta/edmonton is a conversion powerhouse
quick_wins.detail: The Edmonton location page drove 16 sessions (+1500% MoM) with 43.8% engagement rate and is the top landing page by volume; it's clearly resonating with local intent.

quick_wins.title: High-intent location pages are converting well
quick_wins.detail: /saskatchewan/saskatoon achieved 71.4% engagement and /alberta/st-albert hit 100% engagement, proving location-specific content is effective for local search users.

potential_warnings.title: Engagement rate declining despite traffic growth
potential_warnings.detail: Engagement rate fell 15.0 pp MoM even as sessions grew 39%, suggesting the Paid Search influx is bringing lower-quality or less-intent-aligned traffic that isn't converting to engaged sessions.

potential_warnings.title: Organic Search declining sharply
potential_warnings.detail: Organic Search dropped 38.9% MoM to just 11 sessions (19.3% of traffic), reducing reliance on earned search and increasing dependency on paid channels for growth.

potential_warnings.title: Internal navigation engagement collapsed
potential_warnings.detail: internal_clicks fell 54.2% MoM to 11 events, indicating users are not exploring deeper into the site or are exiting earlier, possibly due to weak on-page experience or misaligned traffic sources.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale Paid Search campaigns to high-performing location pages
biggest_opportunities.detail: Layer Paid Search budget and bid strategy toward /alberta/edmonton and /saskatchewan/saskatoon, which show 43.8% and 71.4% engagement respectively; this vertical integration could amplify conversion velocity.

biggest_opportunities.title: Restore and grow Organic Search visibility
biggest_opportunities.detail: Organic Search is down 38.9% MoM; audit on-page SEO, local keyword targeting, and backlink profiles for top location pages to recover earned traffic and reduce Paid Search dependency.

biggest_opportunities.title: Optimize on-page experience to lift engagement rate
biggest_opportunities.detail: With engagement rate at 50.9% and internal_clicks down 54.2%, test page layout, CTA placement, and load speed on /alberta/edmonton and homepage to reduce friction and extend session depth.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand store_locate and get_directions tracking
biggest_opportunities.detail: store_locate generated only 3 events and get_directions 2; these are high-intent, location-based interactions that warrant campaign amplification and improved visibility on local landing pages.
